#  Search for and Filter Submittals (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the Submittals tool.
    * _Note:_ To apply the 'Responsible Contractor' filter, users must also have 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the Project level Directory tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
### Search for a Submittal
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Type a keyword or phrase in the Search box or tap the QR code icon to scan a printed QR code that is linked to a specific location on site (see [Scan a Submittal QR Code (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/scan-a-submittal-qr-code-ios)). This will pull up all the submittals associated with that location.  
Procore searches the following fields for matches:
     * Description​
     * Title   
  
![Submittals Ios Search Submittals](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7100c93e2261c795a89f2e21921bdc84/8dc0505c5973a0f2c84ffdf73ec7cbd3/submittals-ios-search-submittals.png?fm=webp)  



### Filter Submittals
  1. Navigate to the **Submittals** tool on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap **Filter**.  
  
![Submittals Ios Filter Submittals](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/05df250272ed76241516e2ba48fc3d52/d3961615b66a591f59764b9e997e619e/submittals-ios-filter-submittals.png?fm=webp)  

  3. Tap one or more of the following options to apply as filters:
     * **Group By:** * Spec Section* Package
     * **Revisions:** Tap one the following filter options:* All Revisions* Only Current Revisions (Default).
     * **Status:** Tap one of the following filter options:* All* Open* Draft* Closed
     * **Location:** Tap to select a location.
     * **Ball-in-Court:** Tap to select a responsible party.
     * **Responsible Contractor:** Tap to select a responsible contractor.  
_Note:_ You must have ‘Read Only’ or higher permissions on the project’s Directory tool to use this filter.
     * **Type:** Tap to select a submittal type to filter by.
     * **Specification Section:** Tap to select a relevant specification section.
  4. Tap **Apply**.
  5. To reset the filters:
    1. Tap **Filter**.
    2. Tap **Reset All Filters**.  
  
![Submittals Ios Reset Submittal Filters](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/94f7d716ff6cc79750744727aa12e7b1/7b732f8afa4f494d9df4c63006205cba/submittals-ios-reset-submittal-filters.png?fm=webp)  

    3. Tap **Apply**.


## See Also

  * [View a Submittal (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/view-a-submittal-ios)
title: Search for and Filter Submittals (iOS)
description: How to use the search and filter options to locate items in the project level Submittals tool on an iOS mobile device.
